name: EnigmAgent — Local AI Secret Vault
short_description: Secure local vault for AI agents: store API keys encrypted, reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}}. Zero cloud exposure.
description:
EnigmAgent is a local-first secret vault designed for AI agent developers and power users.

Instead of hardcoding API keys and passwords in prompts or scripts, store them in an AES-256-GCM encrypted local vault and reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}} symbols. The vault resolves them automatically at execution time.

Features:
• Local AES-256-GCM vault — no cloud, no telemetry
• {{PLACEHOLDER}} resolution for AI agent tool calls
• Integrates with 40+ AI frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, n8n, etc.)
• Domain-binding security model
• Works with Windows, macOS, and Linux

Security: All encryption and secret access happens locally. No data leaves your machine.
